enrichedMetadata.faq:
Frequently Asked Questions

What is the meaning of the song Thumbakki Thumbai?

The song is a lively dance track that celebrates joy and festivity, featuring playful lyrics that evoke a sense of celebration.

What is the plot context of the song in Madha Gaja Raja?

The song is set in a vibrant party scene, reflecting the carefree and joyous spirit of the characters in the movie.

Who is the singer and music director of the song?

The song is sung and composed by Vijay Antony, showcasing his dual talent in music.

When was Thumbakki Thumbai released?

The song was released on January 13, 2013.
enrichedMetadata.summary: In Thumbakki Thumbai, Vijay Antony delivers an energetic performance that perfectly captures the essence of celebration. The song's upbeat tempo and catchy lyrics create an atmosphere of joy, making it ideal for parties and festive occasions. As the characters revel in their carefree moments, the song evokes feelings of happiness and excitement. Overall, it serves as a vibrant anthem that resonates with the spirit of fun and togetherness.
enrichedMetadata.high_ctr_intro: Thumbakki Thumbai from Madha Gaja Raja is an electrifying dance number that showcases Vijay Antony's vibrant energy and musical prowess. With catchy lyrics by Pa Vijay, this song is sure to get everyone on their feet. Experience the infectious rhythm that makes it a perfect addition to any celebration!
stanzaMeanings: Hey little girl, come here, the dance of the two is like pearls in the nose and blood in the mouth. Iyyapan says, the beautiful rhythm is like a divine symbol, what should I say?

Hey little fish, little fish, are you coming to play? Is it a joke or a game? Is everything in the mirror a lie?
Are you the only one who is special? Will everyone else suffer? How will you take care of them?
You are the olive fruit, you are the color of the apple. In this town, you are the cool pond, yeah ..
I am in the mask, you are beside me, that day will come when rain will fall in my forest.
The queen of mangoes, my jasmine flower, where are you going, where are you going, where are you going?
You are the one who is special, don’t let your eyes wander, don’t let the sparks fly.
You are hungry for the command, I will tell you, now it cannot be held back, look at it carefully.
Just like that, just like that, what should I say? Where are you going, where are you going, where are you going?
